description: Mixed docs+code update: feature work that touches implementation, tests, documentation, and configuration equally across 4 well-separated directories. Directory strategy is optimal — it creates natural reviewer-friendly splits.
rationale: Files span 5 top-level directories (internal, cmd, docs, config, scripts) with 2-4 files each — near-perfect balance. Directory strategy produces 5 groups, all within the 3-7 sweet spot (splitScore=1.0). Each group is thematically coherent for review. Extension would split .go from tests and mix auth+server code.
